hero.lead: 14+ years managing payroll, compliance, and HR operations across multi-entity environments in Saudi Arabia.

about: HR Leader at Mansour Holding — managing payroll for 400+ employees.
Experienced in multi-entity, multi-activity holding companies.
Proficient in Oracle HR, MenaITech, Logix, Jisr, and Advanced Excel.
Full compliance with Saudi Labor Law — GOSI, MHRSD, Mudad, Qiwa.

contact.title: Want to Connect?
contact.description: I welcome questions, partnerships, and job opportunities. I prefer short, clear messages and respond within one business day.
